overall.description: A cinematic drone shot through a flooded cyberpunk city district at golden hour, revealing a sunken vehicle and towering megabuildings with holographic advertisements. The footage showcases high-end game engine rendering with dramatic lighting and detailed water effects characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban street with submerged vehicle

events.description: sunken convertible car comes into view in the shallow water ahead
camera passes the sunken vehicle and begins gradual left turn

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting forward through shallow flood water toward the sun, approaching the submerged vehicle

entered.detail: silver convertible partially submerged in shallow water with debris scattered around it
elevated multi-lane highway structure with concrete supports
tall futuristic building with industrial scaffolding and neon accents
tall smokestacks emitting smoke visible on the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a low-angle drone shot moving through shallow flood water toward a bright sun. A sunken convertible car comes into view and is passed on the left, while an elevated overpass and distant cyberpunk megatowers frame the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded district with cyberpunk skyline and holographic advertisements

events.description: sun moves to the side as camera turns, revealing building details previously in shadow
neon holographic advertisements become visible on the megabuildings

agents.ego_description: panning left to reveal the expansive cityscape while maintaining slow forward drift through the water

entered.detail: tower featuring large pink and blue holographic advertisements and corporate logos
large domed stadium structure with metallic framework and multiple tiers
skyscraper displaying a massive holographic face on its facade
small wooden structure standing alone in the flood water

segments.scene_description: The camera drifts past the sunken car and turns to reveal the cyberpunk skyline. Neon holographic signs illuminate the megabuildings as a large stadium structure comes into view on the right. An abandoned wooden shack stands in the shallow water as the camera continues its sweep.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide flooded plaza with stadium and megabuildings

events.description: camera completes the panoramic sweep and begins turning back toward the sun

agents.ego_description: completing the circular drift through the flooded district, returning to the original sunward view

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera completing its arc around the flooded district. The stadium moves from right to left across the frame as the camera turns back toward the sun. The overpass bridge returns to view on the right as the scene comes full circle to the starting perspective.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous low-angle drone movement through a flooded urban wasteland that gradually reveals a towering cyberpunk skyline. It begins by gliding through shallow floodwaters toward a bright sun, passing a sunken convertible car on the left while an elevated overpass and distant megatowers frame the horizon. As the camera drifts past the vehicle, the perspective shifts to sweep across the water, bringing a weathered wooden shack into view. The scene then expands to reveal the full scale of the city, where neon holographic signs illuminate massive megabuildings and a large stadium structure emerges on the right.

The shot follows a continuous camera arc that completes a sweeping circle around a flooded urban district to return to its original vantage point. It begins with the camera gliding through the water, causing the massive stadium to drift from right to left across the frame. As the movement continues, the perspective shifts back toward the glowing sun, bathing the sunken cityscape in golden light. The scene then opens up to reveal the overpass bridge reappearing on the right, guiding the viewer back toward the starting perspective.
